node.statement: EXISTS — Hamiltonian Simulation (src/simulation/): Sturm.jl has Trotter1, Trotter2, Suzuki{K}, qDRIFT, Composite for Pauli Hamiltonians via pauli_exp!. HOWEVER, the paper uses Hamiltonian simulation as a subroutine inside QPE for the block-encoded H. The existing simulation works on PauliHamiltonian{N} (sum of Pauli strings), not on block-encoded matrices. Need: (1) adapter from block-encoded H to time evolution e^{-iHt}, or (2) QSVT-based approach that bypasses explicit Hamiltonian simulation entirely.
